business.name: Superb Appliances
business.tagline: When your appliances quit, we don't

hero.headline: Your washer dies at 9pm — *we answer*
hero.subheadline: Mr. Thomas and the Superb team fix what's broken, save what's saveable, and keep you from buying new.

services_section.label: WHAT WE FIX
services_section.heading: Every appliance, every brand
services_section.subheading: From washing machines to refrigerators — we diagnose fast and fix it right

services.title: Washer & Dryer Repair
services.description: Won't spin? Not heating? Making weird noises? We'll get your laundry room back to normal.

services.title: Refrigerator Service
services.description: Not cooling, ice maker broken, weird sounds. We handle all fridge problems fast.

services.title: Dishwasher Repair
services.description: Not cleaning, not draining, not starting. We'll have your dishes sparkling again.

services.title: Range & Oven Fix
services.description: Burners not working, oven not heating. Get back to cooking without buying new.

about.heading: Real people, real repairs
about.body: We're the Newport News appliance team that shows up when we say we will. Mr. Thomas leads every job personally — no subcontractors, no runarounds.

reviews.name: Tracie J.
reviews.text: Mr. Thomas was polite, professional, and helpful throughout. He answered all my questions and made everything smooth and stress-free.

reviews.name: T.D. H.
reviews.text: Called on short notice and instead of buying a new washer, he fixed my 3-year-old one. Saved me a lot of money. On time service and great hospitality.

reviews.name: Tashea H.
reviews.text: This man is phenomenal, very dedicated to what he does. Communication is A1. More of a brother than a businessman.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving the Peninsula
service_areas.subheading: Fast appliance repair throughout Newport News and surrounding communities

cta.heading: Don't replace it — repair it first
cta.body: Call Mr. Thomas and the Superb team for an honest diagnosis. We'll tell you if it's worth fixing or time to buy new.
